goals.title: G001 Update CLAUDE.md to match the canonical GCS KG state after biosample/expres
goals.objective:
G001 Update CLAUDE.md to match the canonical GCS KG state after biosample/expression.
G002 Continue missing CLAUDE.md KG checklist items via bounded scratch-first merges.
G003 Validate every promoted KG slice with zero dangling edges.
G004 Run final TxGNN model smoke test on VPS with at most 2 CPU and 4G RAM using a tiny model.
G005 Keep Ralph/team cycles non-overlapping and record evidence/blockers in .omoc memory.
